message:
feat: add pt diff command for comparing session snapshots

Implement the 'pt diff' CLI subcommand that computes and displays differences
between two session snapshots, enabling users to see what changed between
triage runs (new processes, disappeared processes, classification changes,
inference shifts).

New in main.rs:
- DiffArgs struct with --last, --latest, --session, --format, --filter options
- resolve_diff_sessions() for session pair resolution by ID or convenience flags
- filter_diff_deltas() for classification/kind-based delta filtering
- summarize_deltas() for JSON summary generation
- build_cmd_map() and truncate_ascii() helpers
- format_inference_summary() and format_diff_plain() for table output
- run_diff() entry point wired into the CLI dispatch

Enhanced session modules:
- session/diff.rs: DiffConfig, InferenceSummary, enriched ProcessDelta and
  SessionDiff types, improved compute_diff logic
- session/compare.rs: generate_comparison_report improvements
- session/snapshot_persist.rs: load_inference, load_inventory, PersistedProcess
- session/fleet.rs: create_fleet_session, CandidateInfo, HostInput types
- session/resume.rs: resume_plan, load_plan additions
- session/diff_tests.rs, resume_tests.rs: corresponding test coverage

Also adds 'pt diff --last' to README quick-reference.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
